inputs.label: Total Sales
inputs.businessContext: Total sales amount of the sales representative

businessContext_i18n.en: Total sales amount of the sales representative
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant total des ventes du représentant
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto total de ventas del representante

inputs.label: Base Commission Rate
inputs.businessContext: Commission percentage at the base level

businessContext_i18n.en: Commission percentage at the base level
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de commission au niveau de base
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de comisión a nivel base

inputs.label: High Tier Threshold
inputs.businessContext: Sales threshold for applying the high commission rate

businessContext_i18n.en: Sales threshold for applying high commission rate
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüksek komisyon oranının uygulanacağı satış eşiği
businessContext_i18n.de: Umsatzschwelle für Anwendung des höheren Provisionssatzes
businessContext_i18n.fr: Seuil de ventes pour l'application du taux de commission supérieur
businessContext_i18n.es: Umbral de ventas para aplicar la tasa de comisión superior
businessContext_i18n.ar: حد المبيعات الذي سيتم عنده تطبيق نسبة العمولة الأعلى

inputs.label: High Tier Rate
inputs.businessContext: Commission percentage applied at high sales level

businessContext_i18n.en: Commission percentage applied at high sales level
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüksek satış seviyesinde uygulanacak komisyon yüzdesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Provision bei hohem Umsatz
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de commission appliqué au niveau de ventes supérieur
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de comisión aplicado en el nivel de ventas superior
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة العمولة المطبقة على مستوى المبيعات الأعلى

formulas.tier1Commission: totalSales <= highTierThreshold ? totalSales * baseCommissionRate / 100 : highTierThreshold * baseCommissionRate / 100

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
